productDisplayName: Redtape Men Tango Black Formal Shoes
description: Formal slip-on shoes for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Styled in cool sophisticated leather, cut a dash with this pair at any upscale formal do. Wear it with chinos, a formal shirt and an ascot tie. Upper Leather upper with slip-on features Perforations on the sides of forefoot and midfoot area for all day comfort and ventilation Elasticated slits on sides of the tongue for ease of wearing Reinforced overlay at the heel cu[ Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole TPU outsole with an upraised heel and patterned grooves for enhanced grip shoe care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
